title: Guruvayurappa Lyrics Pudhu Pudhu Arthangal Song Lyrics

Guruvayurappa

neethaaney saatchi

Guruvayurappa

raadhai unaku sonna
vedham enna.
naan pogum paadhai
ennaalum un paadhai.

Guruvayurappa 
Guruvayurappa

neethaaney saatchi

thaenaatran karayil
dheiveega kuralil
naanthaan oru 
paattisaithaen.

dhinamdhorum iravil
nadujaamam varayil
naanthaaney adhai
kaettrikundhaen

arangaettram thaan
aagaamal thaan
alaipeyum en jeevanthana

vaa vaa en dhevaa
sempoovaa en dhegam
seraadho un kaigalile.

naan konda kaadhalukku
neethaaney saatchi

enmel oru por thodukka

enai vandhu thaluvu
yen indha pirivu
maaney vaa unai
yaar thadukka

parimaaralaam
pasi aaralaam
poomaalai nee soodum naal

maadhu un meedhu
ippodhu en mogam
paayaadho sol 
poongukyilae

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Guruvayurappa'?

The song expresses deep devotion to Lord Guruvayurappa, highlighting the singer's unwavering faith and love.

In which movie is 'Guruvayurappa' featured?

'Guruvayurappa' is featured in the movie Pudhu Pudhu Arthangal.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by K. S. Chithra and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

Who composed the music for 'Guruvayurappa'?

The music for 'Guruvayurappa' was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Guruvayurappa' released?

'Guruvayurappa' was released on October 28, 1989.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Guruvayurappa' from the movie Pudhu Pudhu Arthangal is a heartfelt devotional piece that encapsulates the essence of devotion to Lord Guruvayurappa. The lyrics convey a deep sense of faith and love, making it a soothing experience for listeners. With its serene melody and powerful vocals, the song evokes feelings of peace and spirituality. It serves as a reminder of the divine presence in everyday life, making it a cherished classic in Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Guruvayurappa is a mesmerizing devotional song that beautifully captures the essence of faith and devotion. With the enchanting voices of K. S. Chithra and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, this track from the movie Pudhu Pudhu Arthangal resonates with spiritual energy. The masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja elevates the listening experience, making it a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: Guruvayurappa, Guruvayurappa, you are the witness to my love. Guruvayurappa, Guruvayurappa, there is no other god like you. What does the scripture say to you? Whatever path I take, it will always be your path. Guruvayurappa, Guruvayurappa, you are the witness to my love. I have sung a song in a divine voice in the temple of the honey bee. Every day and night, I have been waiting for that moment, listening to it. Without any delay, my life will rise and call out to you. Come, my god, will my body merge with you? Guruvayurappa, Guruvayurappa, you are the witness to my love. The memories that rise and the moon above me are like a challenge, come and touch me. Who can separate us? Hunger can’t, flowers can’t. The day you wear the garland, will my love bloom? Guruvayurappa, Guruvayurappa, you are the witness to my love. Guruvayurappa, Guruvayurappa, there is no other god like you. What does the scripture say to you? Whatever path I take, it will always be your path. Guruvayurappa, Guruvayurappa, you are the witness to my love. You are the witness to my love.
